display.purpose: Hero H1 only. Single dominant statement per page.

headline.purpose: Section H2. Same weight family as display.

label.purpose: Section category labels. Always uppercase with tracking.

shadows.name: ambient
shadows.purpose: Hover lift on tool cards. Lightweight.

shadows.name: featured
shadows.purpose: Persistent elevation on featured pricing tier.

shadows.name: cta-orange
shadows.purpose: Orange CTA at rest. Glow matches button color.

shadows.name: cta-blue
shadows.purpose: Blue CTA at rest. Lower than orange hierarchy.

motion.name: entrance
motion.purpose: All entrance reveals and hero animations.

breakpoints.name: mobile
breakpoints.note: Stack grids to 1 column; hide hero visual column.

components.name: Primary CTA Button (Orange)
components.description: Highest-hierarchy action. One per hero or key section.
components.html: Get Free Audit
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 700; color: #FFFFFF; background: #F5A623; padding: 14px 28px; border-radius: 100px; border: none; text-decoration: none; box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(245,166,35,.35); transition: background .2s, transform .2s, box-shadow .2s; cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #D4890A; transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(245,166,35,.45); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid #F5A623; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Secondary CTA Button (Blue)
components.description: Secondary action. Supporting CTAs, section-level "see more".
components.css: .ds-btn-blue { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 700; color: #FFFFFF; background: #1B4FA8; padding: 14px 28px; border-radius: 100px; border: none; text-decoration: none; box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(27,79,168,.30); transition: background .2s, transform .2s; cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-blue:hover { background: #0F3272; transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-blue:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid #1B4FA8; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Nav Contact Button
components.description: Navigation CTA. Smaller radius matches nav geometry.
components.css: .ds-btn-nav { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; color: #FFFFFF; background: #1B4FA8; padding: 9px 22px; border-radius: 8px; border: none; text-decoration: none; line-height: 1; transition: background .2s; cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-nav:hover { background: #0F3272; } .ds-btn-nav:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid #1B4FA8; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Label Chip
components.description: Section category label. Always uppercase with wide tracking.
components.css: .ds-label { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: .12em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #1B4FA8; background: #EEF4FF; border-radius: 100px; padding: 6px 14px; margin-bottom: 20px; }

components.name: Service Card
components.description: Primary content card for service listings. Distinctive bottom-edge reveal on hover.
components.html:
Local SEO

Get found by customers searching your exact service in your exact neighborhood.

From $997/mo
components.css: .ds-service-card { display: flex; flex-direction: column; background: #FFFFFF; border: 1px solid #E5E7EB; border-radius: 20px; padding: 32px; text-decoration: none; color: inherit; position: relative; overflow: hidden; transition: box-shadow .25s, transform .25s, border-color .25s; } .ds-service-card::after { content: ''; position: absolute; bottom: 0; left: 0; right: 0; height: 3px; background: #1B4FA8; transform: scaleX(0); transform-origin: left; transition: transform .3s; } .ds-service-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 12px 48px rgba(0,0,0,.14); transform: translateY(-4px); border-color: transparent; } .ds-service-card:hover::after { transform: scaleX(1); } .ds-service-icon { width: 52px; height: 52px; border-radius: 14px; background: #EEF4FF; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; margin-bottom: 20px; color: #1B4FA8; transition: background .25s, transform .25s; } .ds-service-card:hover .ds-service-icon { background: #1B4FA8; color: #FFFFFF; transform: scale(1.1) rotate(-4deg); } .ds-service-card h3 { font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 700; color: #0D1B2A; margin: 0 0 10px; } .ds-service-card p { font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.65; color: #4B5563; margin: 0 0 20px; flex: 1; } .ds-service-footer { margin-top: auto; } .ds-service-price { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; color: #1B4FA8; background: #EEF4FF; border-radius: 100px; padding: 4px 12px; }

components.name: Navigation
components.description: Sticky top nav. 72px height. White bg, divider border-bottom.
components.html:
THRYV
  • Services
  • Pricing
Contact
components.css: .ds-nav { position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 100; background: #FFFFFF; border-bottom: 1px solid #E5E7EB; box-shadow: 0 2px 16px rgba(0,0,0,.06); } .ds-nav-inner { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; height: 72px; max-width: 1160px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 24px; } .ds-nav-logo { font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; font-weight: 800; color: #1B4FA8; font-size: 18px; text-decoration: none; } .ds-nav-links { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; list-style: none; margin: 0; padding: 0; } .ds-nav-link { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; color: #4B5563; padding: 8px 12px; border-radius: 8px; text-decoration: none; transition: color .2s, background .2s; } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: #1B4FA8; background: #EEF4FF; } .ds-btn-nav { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; color: #FFFFFF; background: #1B4FA8; padding: 9px 22px; border-radius: 8px; text-decoration: none; transition: background .2s; } .ds-btn-nav:hover { background: #0F3272; }

narrative.overview:
Thryv's design system is built for credibility earned through specificity, not performed through flash. The visual language strips away everything that doesn't pull its weight. Every surface decision is an act of confidence: a deep navy that commands attention, an orange that earns its intensity by appearing exactly when trust needs a signal.

This is a brand register site — the agency's portfolio IS the website. Every design choice proves or disproves the craft being sold. Sections move through three moods: daylight (white, off-white, tinted) for familiar business context, authority (deep navy) for commanding expertise, signal (orange accents) for moments of action.
keyCharacteristics: Two-color palette strictly applied: Harbor Blue (#1B4FA8) and Sunrise Orange (#F5A623)
Single typeface (Plus Jakarta Sans) at extreme weight contrast: 800 display / 400 body
Pill-shaped buttons (100px radius) everywhere except navigation (8px radius exception)
Tonal surface system: white, off-white, gulf-tint, deep navy — hierarchy without complexity
Orange appears as accent, signal, or CTA only — never as section fill or decoration

rules.name: The Signal Rule
rules.body: Sunrise Orange appears on ≤12% of any screen. Every orange element is a signal: CTA, stat, badge, eyebrow. Using orange as background fill destroys the signal.

rules.name: The Three-Surface Rule
rules.body: Light sections: White or Off-White. Transitional: Gulf Tint accents. Authority sections: Miami Night. No section breaks this progression without a structural reason.

rules.name: The Contrast Rule
rules.body: Heading weight is always 800. Body weight is always 400-500. The 300-unit gap between them is what makes hierarchy legible.

rules.name: The No-Second-Typeface Rule
rules.body: Plus Jakarta Sans only. The weight range of this family covers all cases without a second typeface.

rules.name: The Flat-by-Default Rule
rules.body: Cards do not cast shadows at rest unless they're the featured/selected item. Hover shadows must be noticeably larger to signal interactivity.

dos: Keep Sunrise Orange on ≤12% of any screen — rarity is the signal
Use Ink (#0D1B2A) for primary text on light surfaces, never pure #000
Follow the three-surface rhythm: white → off-white → deep navy as sections alternate
Use weight 800 for all display and headline text — the contrast IS the hierarchy
Honor prefers-reduced-motion: reduce — all animations must disable on this preference
Include Spanish trust signals on key conversion sections (Miami market is ~30% Spanish-dominant)
Animate entrances with cubic-bezier(.22,1,.36,1) — exponential ease-out
donts: Don't use glassmorphism on light backgrounds — hero glass cards are structural, not stylistic
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text + gradient fill)
Don't use border-left/right > 1px as a decorative accent stripe on cards or callouts
Don't replicate the generic SaaS template: gradient hero orb, identical card grids, 'platform for growth' copy
Don't add a second typeface — Plus Jakarta Sans handles all cases
Don't use color as the only state differentiator — hover/focus must also shift transform or background
Don't fabricate social proof — authority comes from specificity, not volume claims
Don't add decorative animations — motion is for state transitions and entrance reveals only
